attributes.additional_details: Because the UK needs to focus on bigger problems
attributes.background: Focus on stopping excess deforestation, prevent unnecessary carbon emissions and to invest in helping industrialising countries

rejection.details:
Petitions need to call on the Government or Parliament to take a specific action.

We are not sure exactly what you'd like the Government or Parliament to do. How would you like them to stop excess deforestation and prevent unnecessary carbon emissions?

You could start a new petition explaining clearly what you would like the Government or Parliament to do. We also do not accept petitions that do not include a full name.
